video_info.title: UEFA International Friendlies
video_info.shortDescription: Portugal take on Chile in a friendly clash as both sides look to fine-tune preparations with a blend of technical excellence and attacking flair. Expect a captivating encounter, with Portugal’s possession-based control up against Chile’s intensity and quick transitions. Catch all the action from the International Friendlies, LIVE on Sony LIV.
